mapper.select: SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE activity_type = #{activityType} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE activity_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} ORDER BY activity_date DESC

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE activity_author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT activity_id, client_id, po_id, activity_author_id, activity_date, activity_type, activity_title, activity_content, activity_priority, activity_schedule_from, activity_schedule_to, created_at, updated_at FROM activities WHERE client_id = #{clientId} AND activity_type = #{activityType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
